TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Donnie_Boyce, title = Donnie_Boyce, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Donnie_Boyce} }

S.FORM: Donnie Boyce sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1973, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 9, Donnie Boyce, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Donnie Boyce mqwas biru maki ilinuoico meut' puluouesuotung gocyu.cyux hopa pqwasan biru praw squliq na p'unro. qnxan na sinsiy 2011 kawas, Boyce t'aring pcbaq seto' maki pqwasan biru . 2015 kawas 10 byacing 19 ryax,Boyce NBA na Texas Legends sinsiy. 2016 kawas 3 byacing, Boyce mtzyaw sinsiy nya maki Proviso East. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Donnie Boyce sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1973, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 9, Donnie Boyce, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Donnie Boyce mqwas biru maki ilinuoico meut' puluouesuotung gocyu.cyux hopa pqwasan biru praw squliq na p'unro. qnxan na sinsiy 2011 kawas, Boyce t'aring pcbaq seto' maki pqwasan biru . 2015 kawas 10 byacing 19 ryax,Boyce NBA na Texas Legends sinsiy. 2016 kawas 3 byacing, Boyce mtzyaw sinsiy nya maki Proviso East. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *onnie ő≤oj ¶~ ®e s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, *onnie ő≤oj ¶~ ®e, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) *onnie ő≤oj ¶~ ®e mqwas~…ē ő≤iru maki ilinuoi ¶~ ®o meut Ē puluoues~…ēuotuŇč …£o ¶~ ®ju. ¶~ ®jux ńßopa pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru praw s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. qnxan na s~…ēins~…ēij **** kawas~…ē, ő≤oj ¶~ ®e t ĒariŇč p ¶~ ®ő≤aq s~…ēeto Ē maki pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru . **** kawas~…ē ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax,ő≤oj ¶~ ®e nő≤a na texas~…ē le…£en*s~…ē s~…ēins~…ēij. **** kawas~…ē * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč, ő≤oj ¶~ ®e mtzjaw s~…ēins~…ēij nja maki pro*is~…ēo eas~…ēt. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
